summary: Phase 4 POS system testing completed successfully. All role-based permissions, user management, payment methods CRUD, inventory reports with costs, and DGII exports are working correctly. Backend APIs passed all 48 tests. Frontend correctly implements role-based redirects and permission filtering.
passed_tests: Admin login (PIN 0000) redirects to /dashboard with full permissions
Carlos waiter login (PIN 1234) redirects to /tables with limited permissions
Luis cashier login (PIN 4321) works with cashier permissions
Sidebar navigation filtering based on user permissions
Table edit mode hidden from waiters, visible to admins
Users API returns all 5 users with permissions field
Payment methods CRUD operations (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Inventory reports with costs and profit margins
Profit reports with product-level margin analysis
Settings page user management with 5 users and edit buttons
Settings page payment methods management with CRUD buttons
Core POS workflow (order creation, kitchen, billing, payment) still functional
Loyalty points integration in billing process
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (48/48 tests passed), Frontend: ~95% (role-based permissions and UI features working correctly)
